title: Mega Emboar Battle Guide
summary: A bulky [Fire]/[Fighting] mixed attacker with [mold-breaker] — ignores target abilities and uses 148/110 offenses with 110 HP.
strengths: 148 Attack and 110 Special Attack for mixed sets
110 HP supports a bulky pivot role

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Emboar is a bulky mixed [Fire]/[Fighting] attacker whose gimmick is [mold-breaker] — it ignores target abilities. This lets [earthquake] hit [levitate] users, [flare-blitz] bypass [flash-fire], and [close-combat] work against [bulletproof] walls. 148 Attack and 110 Special Attack allow mixed sets, and 110 HP gives it pivot durability.

## Strengths
[mold-breaker] is the defining feature — passive immunities like [levitate], [flash-fire], [water-absorb], [sturdy], and [unaware] all disappear. Against a [rotom-heat], [earthquake] suddenly becomes a valid KO option; against [sturdy] users, no [focus-sash] escape. 148 Attack plus STAB is hard to switch into, and the [Fire]/[Fighting] dual STAB covers almost everything neutrally.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Flying], [Psychic], [Ground], and [Water] are all common weaknesses, so switch reads matter. [Water] attackers threaten outright KOs and [psychic] moves punish [Fighting] STAB. Speed 75 means Mega Emboar moves second against most of the meta.

## Recommended Moveset
[flare-blitz] is the main STAB. [close-combat] completes the dual-STAB plan. [earthquake] is the [mold-breaker] punish move that also spreads damage in doubles. [protect] secures the Mega turn.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[emboarite] is mandatory. [mold-breaker] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [Fire] boosts STAB, while Tera [Fighting] adds resistances to [Flying] and [Psychic].

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Water], [Flying], and [Psychic] with [Electric], [Dark], and [Fairy] partners. [intimidate] support extends physical bulk. [trick-room] cores benefit from the slow Speed.

## Play Patterns
Mega evolve and immediately start clicking dual STAB. Use [earthquake] against [levitate] or [sturdy] users as a surprise. Pivot out when [Water] or [Psychic] pressure appears, and Tera on the turn you commit to sweeping.
